name: Italian Macaronie and Cheese
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Mild or hot Italian sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the macaroni in water according to directions; drain.
2. Crumble sausage into a 10-inch pan; cook over medium-high heat until well browned.
3. Lift out the sausage from the frying pan with a slotted spoon and set aside. Discard all but 2 tablespoons of drippings.
4. Into the drippings, add the butter and onion and cook, stirring until the onion is limp.
5. Add the garlic, pepper, and mushrooms and cook until the mushrooms are soft and all liquid evaporates.
6. Stir in the flour and cook until bubbly.
7. Gradually stir in the milk to make a smooth sauce. Continue cooking and stirring until the sauce thickens, about 3 minutes.
8. Add oregano, basil, salt, Parmesan cheese, and drained macaroni; stir to coat.
9. Place half of the macaroni mixture in a buttered 2-1/2 quart baking dish. Sprinkle the sausage on top.
10. Then layer the remaining macaroni and Jack cheese.
11. Bake uncovered in a 400°F oven for 20 minutes, or until the cheese is bubbly and center is hot.
